key_points: Manufacturing means producing goods from raw materials in factories
Manufacturing industries belong to the secondary sector of the economy
Industries create employment and increase economic growth
Agro-based industries use agricultural products as raw materials
Mineral-based industries use minerals such as iron ore and bauxite
examples: Iron and steel industry uses iron ore
formulas: Manufacturing = Raw materials + Labour + Capital + Technology
Industrial production contributes to GDP and employment
exam_tips: Remember examples of agro-based and mineral-based industries
Learn important industries like textile, iron and steel, cement
Focus on locations of major industries in India
